menu_items.name: Wonton Soup

menu_items.name: Hot and Sour Soup
menu_items.description: A spicy and tangy broth with tofu, mushrooms, bamboo shoots, and egg.

menu_items.description: A medley of fresh seasonal vegetables in a light vegetable broth.

menu_items.name: Corn and Egg Soup
menu_items.description: Sweet corn and egg in a creamy, comforting broth.

menu_items.name: Seafood Tofu Soup
menu_items.description: Fresh seafood and silken tofu in a ginger-scented broth.
